eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Jackson, OR; at 3:48 PM on JUL 10, 2026 Effective until 7:48 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Wildfire Alert - Jackson County Sheriff's Office has issued a Level 1 BE READY to evacuate for JAC-036 near 18000 block E Evans Creek rd due to East Evans Creek rd Fire. Monitor local news sources for evacuation and incident information.
